headline: Insulated Metal Panels Market by Metal Type, Insulation Material, Application, End-use, and Region - Global Forecast to 2030
summary: The insulated metal panels market is expected to reach USD 15.01 billion by 2025 and USD 17.13 billion by 2030, growing at a CAGR of 2.69%. This expansion is driven by rising urbanization and the demand for efficient construction technologies. Stringent energy-saving regulations further boost market growth. The steel segment will capture the largest share in 2030 due to its durability and cost-effectiveness, while the mineral wool segment will exhibit the highest CAGR for its fire resistance and
